scenes.title: It Refused To Die
scenes.prompt: Extreme close-up of a vibrant green sprout pushing through cracked, dry, dark soil, surrounded by a few withered, brown leaves, with warm golden backlighting creating a soft glow around the tiny sprout, shallow depth of field, abstract impressionistic texture, rich emerald green and earthy brown tones, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Slow push-in towards the resilient sprout, with very subtle dust motes floating in the light, 1.75s

scenes.title: Abandoned For Decades
scenes.prompt: Bold white sans-serif text 'ABANDONED FOR DECADES' centered on a dark, mossy, blurred background of tangled vines and damp stone, soft diffuse light, high contrast, clean typography, subtle paper texture, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Gentle zoom out with a slight pulse, 2.32s
scenes._words: The garden had been abandoned for decades,

scenes.title: Thorns Locking It Shut
scenes.prompt: Close-up of a rusted wrought-iron gate, completely entwined with thorny rose vines, some thorns interlocking, drops of dew visible on the iron and petals, soft natural light, deep shadows, shallow depth of field, 35mm lens, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Slow tilt up along the thorny gate, 4.28s
scenes._words: Roses climbed the iron gate, their thorns locking it shut.

scenes.title: Ivy Skin
scenes.prompt: Eye-level medium shot of an ancient stone wall, entirely covered in a thick, dense layer of dark green ivy, revealing minimal stone, soft, diffuse light filtering through leaves, cool green and grey tones, abstract painterly texture, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Static hold with subtle light shifts, 2.98s
scenes._words: Ivy covered the stone walls like a second skin.

scenes.title: Crooked Apple Tree
scenes.prompt: Wide shot of a crooked, gnarled apple tree standing wild in the center of an overgrown garden, surrounded by tall weeds and remnants of a crumbled stone fountain base, overcast soft light, muted earthy tones, abstract painterly texture, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Slow dolly-in towards the apple tree, 5.7s
scenes._words: And at the center, where a fountain had once stood, a single apple tree grew crooked and wild,

scenes.title: No One Picked
scenes.prompt: Extreme close-up of a single ripe red apple hanging heavy on a branch, partially obscured by green leaves, with hints of an overgrown garden bokeh in the background, soft autumn light, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Gentle sway of the apple, as if in a soft breeze, 2.77s
scenes._words: its branches heavy with fruit that no one picked.

scenes.title: Birds Came and Went
scenes.prompt: Medium shot of empty bird's nest woven into a thick branch of an apple tree, sunlight dappling through the leaves, soft focus background, natural rustic textures, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Slow zoom out revealing a bit more of the tree canopy, 1.4s

scenes.title: Seasons Turned
scenes.prompt: Bold white sans-serif text 'SEASONS TURNED' centered on a blurred background of autumn leaves in red, orange, and gold, high contrast, clean typography, subtle textured paper feel, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Gentle pulse with a subtle color shift, 0.62s

scenes.title: Answering To No One
scenes.prompt: Wide shot of the wild, untamed garden at dusk, long shadows stretching, golden hour light illuminating parts of the overgrown foliage, mysterious and peaceful atmosphere, cinematic realistic
scenes.image_to_video: Static shot with a subtle shift in light and shadow, 3.1s
scenes._words: The garden kept its own time, answering to no one.
